name: Southwest White Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds boneless skinless chicken breast halves, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the spices together to make Southwest Spice Blend.
2. Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium-high heat. Add chicken and onions; cook for 4-5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Stir in broth, green chiles, and Southwest Spice Blend; simmer for 15 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
4. Stir in beans; continue to simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
5. Top with sliced green onions. If desired, garnish with shredded Monterey Jack cheese before serving.
